title: Bits & Bobs
description: A mod about useful blocks and items.  Adds a withered version of Bones/Bone Meal.  Also adds Marker blocks in all 16 vanilla colors that appear to glow in the dark- good for chroma key/greenscreen!
body:
![Bits & Bobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8efd80a157955d8d38c4428ebe381427cd25a6cb.png)

## Description
*Bits & Bobs* features several new blocks and items to enhance your gameplay experience.

### Features (as of version 1.21.8-1.1.0):
- Withered Bone drops from Wither Skeletons, craftable into Withered Bone Meal and Withered Bone Blocks
- Withered Bone Meal is good for clearing foliage in the Nether and Overworld!
- Withered Bone Meal also converts some blocks like Grass, Moss, Coral, and Dark Oak Saplings 
- 16 Marker blocks, which have emissive textures and appear to glow in the dark (good for chroma keying/greenscreen in videos!)
- Undyed Concrete Powder
- Block of Charcoal
- Bundle of Sticks
- Stick Bale
- Sugar Cane Bale

## Support
Mod versions prior to 1.21.8-1.1.0 are no longer supported.

If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!

## Credits
*Undyed Concrete textures are from [Dyeless Concrete Recipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/dyeless-concrete-recipes) by formerlyduck, used under the MIT license.*
